## New PVP Textures
Adds new blue themed textures for basically every PVP gamemode.

If you have any Suggestions put them in the Discords Suggestions Channel!
![New Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7625288cb92703d05cff742fad758d643452c048.png)
<details>
  <summary>Extra Features</summary>

  Small Totem Pops, Blue GUI Features, Small Shield, No Annoying Particles
